/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests_playlists.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/MediaPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/Song.cpp.o -o tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1 _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
